name: Incomplete Sanitization
description: Replacing only one dangerous character (e.g., <) while leaving others (e.g., >) is insufficient and can be bypassed.
rationale: Sanitization must be comprehensive. Use a well-tested library for HTML escaping instead of ad-hoc replacements.
compliant_code:
import DOMPurify from 'dompurify';
const clean = DOMPurify.sanitize(input);
